28 June 2021 Online English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Programme 2020-2021 Academic Year Spring Semester Remotely Proctored Online DÜİYES Guidelines

Dear Students,

2020-2021 Spring Term English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered online on Monday, June 28, 2021 and will be remotely invigilated. The exam consists of two sessions and the students are required to attend both sessions.

The exam will be held at 11:00 at

douonlineydb.dogus.edu.tr

.  Students are obliged to approve PDP INFORMATION and EXPLICIT CONSENT TEXT on the platform prior to the start of their exam. All students must attend classes in Microsoft Teams where they were placed at

10.30 for the first session

and at

13.30 for the second session

. Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam.

Students who do not want to attend the online exam with remote monitoring must state their exam preferences by sending an e-mail to

[email protected]

address via their student e-mail address by June 25, 17:00. Those students can take the invigilated exam without a camera and microphone in the Computer Laboratory B101 located in Çengelköy Campus.

Students are allowed their own preferences when it comes to taking the exam in campus or online. Students who do not state their preference to take the exam in Çengelköy Campus with a written document until the stated deadline will be assumed to have preferred to sit the exam online with their camera and microphone turned on outside of the campus.

* Information about the exam lists will be announced on our website on Friday, June 25.

* DÜİYES results will be announced on OBS on July 2, 2021.
